org.apache.juneau.http.header.CacheControl.Builder

Description
org.apache.juneau.http.header
Next-generation HTTP header implementations.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server

  • Uses of CacheControl.Builder in org.apache.juneau.http.header

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.header that return CacheControl.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.create()
    Creates a new empty CacheControl.Builder.
    CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.Builder.extension(String value)
    Adds an arbitrary cache-control extension directive (e.g.
    CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.Builder.immutable()
    Adds the immutable directive.
    CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.Builder.maxAge(long seconds)
    Adds the max-age=N directive (seconds).
    CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.Builder.maxAge(Duration value)
    Adds the max-age=N directive from a Duration.
    CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.Builder.mustRevalidate()
    Adds the must-revalidate directive.
    CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.Builder.noCache()
    Adds the no-cache directive.
    CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.Builder.noStore()
    Adds the no-store directive.
    CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.Builder.noTransform()
    Adds the no-transform directive.
    CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.Builder.privateCache()
    Adds the private directive (responses may only be cached by the originating client).
    CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.Builder.proxyRevalidate()
    Adds the proxy-revalidate directive (must-revalidate for shared caches only).
    CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.Builder.publicCache()
    Adds the public directive (responses may be cached by any cache).
    CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.Builder.sMaxAge(long seconds)
    Adds the s-maxage=N directive (shared-cache max-age in seconds).
    CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.Builder.sMaxAge(Duration value)
    Adds the s-maxage=N directive from a Duration.
    CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.Builder.staleIfError(long seconds)
    Adds the stale-if-error=N directive (seconds).
    CacheControl.Builder
    CacheControl.Builder.staleWhileRevalidate(long seconds)
    Adds the stale-while-revalidate=N directive (seconds).

  • Uses of CacheControl.Builder in org.apache.juneau.rest.server

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server with parameters of type CacheControl.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.cacheControl(CacheControl.Builder value)
    Sets the Cache-Control response header from a CacheControl.Builder.
